controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (rural co-operative banks - voluntary amalgamation) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Rural Co-operative
Banks - Voluntary Amalgamation) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (rural co-operative banks - voluntary amalgamation) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into force with immediate effect
controls.control_description: These Directions shall come into force with immediate effect.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into force with immediate effect

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to all rural co-operative banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank')
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be applicable to all Rural Co-operative Banks (hereinafter
collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank').
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to all rural co-operative banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank')

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean state co-operative banks (collectively referred to as 'stcbs' and individually as an 'stcb') and central co- operative banks (collectively referr
controls.control_description:
In this context, rural co-operative banks shall mean State Co-operative Banks
(collectively referred to as 'StCBs' and individually as an 'StCB') and Central Co-
operative Banks (collectively referred to as 'DCCBs' and individually as a
'DCCB'), as defined in the National Bank for Agriculture and Rural Development
Act, 1981.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean state co-operative banks (collectively referred to as 'stcbs' and individually as an 'stcb') and central co- operative banks (collectively referr

controls.control_objective: To ensure bear the meanings assigned to them below: (1) 'amalgamated entity' means the entity which is proposed to transfer its business to another entity under
controls.control_description:
In these directions, unless the context states otherwise, the terms herein shall
bear the meanings assigned to them below:
(1) 'Amalgamated Entity' means the entity which is proposed to transfer its
business to another entity under the scheme of amalgamation.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bear the meanings assigned to them below: (1) 'amalgamated entity' means the entity which is proposed to transfer its business to another entity under

controls.control_objective: To ensure the entity which is to acquire the business of the amalgamated entity under the scheme of amalgamation
controls.control_description:
(2) 'Amalgamating Entity' means the entity which is to acquire the business
of the amalgamated entity under the scheme of amalgamation.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the entity which is to acquire the business of the amalgamated entity under the scheme of amalgamation

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the reserve bank of india act, 1934, or the banking regulation act, 1949, or the national ba
controls.control_description:
All other expressions, unless defined herein, shall have the same meaning as
have been assigned to them under the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934, or the
Banking Regulation Act, 1949, or the National Bank for Agriculture and Rural
Development Act, 1981, or any statutory modification or re-enactment thereto,
or Glossary of Terms published by the RBI, or as used in commercial parlance,
as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the reserve bank of india act, 1934, or the banking regulation act, 1949, or the national ba

controls.control_objective: To ensure be covered under these directions: (1) one or more dccbs in a state with the stcb or (2) one dccb with another dccb
controls.control_description:
The undernoted cases of amalgamation shall be covered under these Directions:
(1) One or more DCCBs in a State with the StCB or
(2) One DCCB with another DCCB.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be covered under these directions: (1) one or more dccbs in a state with the stcb or (2) one dccb with another dccb

controls.control_objective: To ensure be approved by two-third of the majority of the shareholders, both in number and value, present and voting at a general body meeting of each bank conc
controls.control_description:
The draft scheme of amalgamation shall be approved by two-third of the majority
of the shareholders, both in number and value, present and voting at a General
Body Meeting of each bank concerned, in accordance with the provisions of
Section 44A read with Section 56 of the BR Act, 1949.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be approved by two-third of the majority of the shareholders, both in number and value, present and voting at a general body meeting of each bank conc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be published in newspapers at least once a week for three consecutive weeks in not less than two newspapers circulating in the locality or localities
controls.control_description:
The notices of every meeting of the shareholders called for approving the draft
scheme of amalgamation shall be published in newspapers at least once a week
for three consecutive weeks in not less than two newspapers circulating in the
locality or localities where the registered offices of the banks are situated, and
one of the newspapers shall be in a language commonly understood in the
locality or localities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be published in newspapers at least once a week for three consecutive weeks in not less than two newspapers circulating in the locality or localities

controls.control_objective: To ensure be examined by rbi in consultation with national bank for agriculture and rural development ('nabard') and the sanction / approval will be a two-stage
controls.control_description:
The proposal for amalgamation shall be examined by RBI in consultation with
National Bank for Agriculture and Rural Development ('NABARD') and the
sanction / approval will be a two-stage process.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be examined by rbi in consultation with national bank for agriculture and rural development ('nabard') and the sanction / approval will be a two-stage

controls.control_objective: To ensure make a proposal for amalgamation after conducting a detailed study of the legal framework, along with a strategy for additional capital infusion, assu
controls.control_description:
(a) The State Government of the State shall make a proposal for
amalgamation after conducting a detailed study of the legal
framework, along with a strategy for additional capital infusion,
assurance regarding financial support if required, a projected
business model with clear profitability and the proposed
governance model for the amalgamated bank.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to make a proposal for amalgamation after conducting a detailed study of the legal framework, along with a strategy for additional capital infusion, assu

controls.control_objective: To ensure have been examined and recommended by nabard before submission to rbi
controls.control_description:
(b) The proposal of the State Government should have been
examined and recommended by NABARD before submission to
RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have been examined and recommended by nabard before submission to rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure be approved by the requisite majority of shareholders of the respective banks as set out in paragraph 7 of these directions
controls.control_description:
(c) The scheme of amalgamation shall be approved by the requisite
majority of shareholders of the respective banks as set out in
paragraph 7 of these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be approved by the requisite majority of shareholders of the respective banks as set out in paragraph 7 of these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in compliance with the legal requirements and past orders or rulings of the courts
controls.control_description:
(a) The proposal shall be in compliance with the legal requirements
and past orders or rulings of the Courts, if any.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in compliance with the legal requirements and past orders or rulings of the courts

controls.control_objective: To ensure also verify that there are no court orders prohibiting or staying the proposal for amalgamation
controls.control_description:
The State
Government shall also verify that there are no Court Orders
prohibiting or staying the proposal for amalgamation.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also verify that there are no court orders prohibiting or staying the proposal for amalgamation

controls.control_objective: To ensure be robust
controls.control_description:
(b) The financial parameters of the entity post-amalgamation,
based on notionally consolidated latest audited financial
statements, shall be robust.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be robust

controls.control_objective: To ensure have crar above the prescribed regulatory minimum, gross npa below seven <image> percent and net npa below five percent, along with adequate liquid as
controls.control_description:
The entity shall have CRAR above
the prescribed regulatory minimum, Gross NPA below seven
<image>
percent and Net NPA below five percent, along with adequate
liquid assets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have crar above the prescribed regulatory minimum, gross npa below seven <image> percent and net npa below five percent, along with adequate liquid as

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a profit making and financially viable entity on a sustained basis
controls.control_description:
Post-amalgamation, it shall be a profit making and
financially viable entity on a sustained basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a profit making and financially viable entity on a sustained basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a satisfactory track record of regulatory and supervisory compliance
controls.control_description:
(c) The amalgamating entity shall have a satisfactory track record
of regulatory and supervisory compliance.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a satisfactory track record of regulatory and supervisory compliance

controls.control_objective: To ensure have strong governance / management practices
controls.control_description:
(d) The amalgamating entity shall have strong governance /
management practices.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have strong governance / management practices

controls.control_objective: To ensure be executed by the constituents i
controls.control_description:
(a) An MOU shall be executed by the constituents i.e., the
amalgamated DCCB(s), the amalgamating entity (StCB or
another DCCB, as applicable) and the State Government
covering issues of governance structure, management,
manpower / HR issues and the manner of arriving at the share
swap ratio based on the net worth of the amalgamated entities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be executed by the constituents i

controls.control_objective: To ensure be computed in accordance with the guidelines contained in reserve bank of india (rural co-operative banks - miscellaneous) directions, 2025 and other
controls.control_description:
The net worth of both the amalgamated and amalgamating
entities shall be computed in accordance with the guidelines
contained in Reserve Bank of India (Rural Co-operative Banks -
Miscellaneous) Directions, 2025 and other regulatory guidelines
as may be applicable.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be computed in accordance with the guidelines contained in reserve bank of india (rural co-operative banks - miscellaneous) directions, 2025 and other

controls.control_objective: To ensure be carried out by chartered accountants
controls.control_description:
(b) Due diligence on the amalgamated entities shall be carried out
by Chartered Accountants.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be carried out by chartered accountants

controls.control_objective: To ensure be allotted on the basis of the net worth of the amalgamated entities
controls.control_description:
Shares in the amalgamating entity
shall be allotted on the basis of the net worth of the amalgamated
entities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be allotted on the basis of the net worth of the amalgamated entities

controls.control_objective: To ensure be determined based on the valuation of assets and liabilities conducted by a chartered accountant firm registered with insolvency and bankruptcy boar
controls.control_description:
Share swap ratios for allotment of shares shall be
determined based on the valuation of assets and liabilities
conducted by a chartered accountant firm registered with
Insolvency and Bankruptcy Board of India (IBBI) as valuers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be determined based on the valuation of assets and liabilities conducted by a chartered accountant firm registered with insolvency and bankruptcy boar

controls.control_objective: To ensure infuse sufficient capital in such dccbs to ensure that the shareholders of such dccbs are allotted at least one share each
controls.control_description:
(c) If, as a result of share swap ratio based on net worth,
shareholders of some DCCBs cannot be allotted any shares, the
State Government shall infuse sufficient capital in such DCCBs
to ensure that the shareholders of such DCCBs are allotted at
least one share each.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to infuse sufficient capital in such dccbs to ensure that the shareholders of such dccbs are allotted at least one share each

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made for impairment of assets
controls.control_description:
(d) In addition to compliance with extant income recognition, asset
classification and provisioning norms, full provision shall be
made for impairment of assets, if any, arising from frauds,
misappropriation etc., while arriving at the value of net assets of
the entities under amalgamation.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made for impairment of assets

controls.control_objective: To ensure be required to adhere to the crar norms prescribed by rbi from time to time
controls.control_description:
(e) The amalgamating entity, post-amalgamation, shall be required
to adhere to the CRAR norms prescribed by RBI from time to
time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be required to adhere to the crar norms prescribed by rbi from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure be met by the state government on an ongoing basis
controls.control_description:
Any shortfall in capital required to meet the CRAR
requirement shall be met by the State Government on an
ongoing basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be met by the state government on an ongoing basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure meet with the regulatory requirements laid down for grant of various permissions / approvals given to the amalgamated entities so that none of the ser
controls.control_description:
(f) The amalgamating entity, post-amalgamation, shall meet with
the regulatory requirements laid down for grant of various
permissions / approvals given to the amalgamated entities so
that none of the services currently extended by the entities under
amalgamation get jeopardised.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to meet with the regulatory requirements laid down for grant of various permissions / approvals given to the amalgamated entities so that none of the ser

controls.control_objective: To ensure be obtained before the entity commences operations post-amalgamation
controls.control_description:
The required regulatory
approvals for the said services shall be obtained before the entity
commences operations post-amalgamation.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be obtained before the entity commences operations post-amalgamation

controls.control_objective: To ensure be phased out non- disruptively within one year of grant of final approval
controls.control_description:
In case the
amalgamating entity is not eligible to continue with certain lines
of business which the amalgamated entities have been
permitted, such lines of business shall be phased out non-
disruptively within one year of grant of final approval.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be phased out non- disruptively within one year of grant of final approval

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that its it system is appropriately configured to enable seamless integration with the it systems of all entities under amalgamation before app
controls.control_description:
(g) The amalgamating entity shall ensure that its IT system is
appropriately configured to enable seamless integration with the
IT systems of all entities under amalgamation before applying for
final approval.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that its it system is appropriately configured to enable seamless integration with the it systems of all entities under amalgamation before app

controls.control_objective: To ensure be completed prior to amalgamation
controls.control_description:
A migration audit of the IT systems of all
amalgamated entities shall be completed prior to amalgamation.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be completed prior to amalgamation

controls.control_objective: To ensure be established and certified before the entities under amalgamation can migrate onto the platform of the amalgamating entity
controls.control_description:
System integrity shall be established and certified before the
entities under amalgamation can migrate onto the platform of the
amalgamating entity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be established and certified before the entities under amalgamation can migrate onto the platform of the amalgamating entity

controls.control_objective: To ensure be constituted within three months of amalgamation
controls.control_description:
(h) A new Board of the post-amalgamation entity shall be
constituted within three months of amalgamation.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be constituted within three months of amalgamation

controls.control_objective: To ensure meet the 'fit & proper criteria' prescribed by rbi
controls.control_description:
The MD / CEO
<image>
who is to be appointed shall meet the 'Fit & Proper criteria'
prescribed by RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to meet the 'fit & proper criteria' prescribed by rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure be set up for the post-amalgamation entity within three months of amalgamation, in accordance with the provisions of the reserve bank of india (urban
controls.control_description:
(i) In addition to the Board of Directors, a 'Board of Management'
(BoM) shall be set up for the post-amalgamation entity within
three months of amalgamation, in accordance with the
provisions of the Reserve Bank of India (Urban Co-operative
Banks - Governance) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be set up for the post-amalgamation entity within three months of amalgamation, in accordance with the provisions of the reserve bank of india (urban

controls.control_objective: To ensure be amended to incorporate the provisions relating to the bom as prescribed by rbi
controls.control_description:
For this purpose, the
bye-laws of the amalgamating entity shall be amended to
incorporate the provisions relating to the BoM as prescribed by
RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be amended to incorporate the provisions relating to the bom as prescribed by rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide a sufficient notice period to the depositors of the amalgamated entities to enable them to decide whether to continue their deposits
controls.control_description:
(j) In case of divergence in interest rates offered on deposits by the
amalgamating entity and the amalgamated entities, the
amalgamating entity shall provide a sufficient notice period to the
depositors of the amalgamated entities to enable them to decide
whether to continue their deposits.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide a sufficient notice period to the depositors of the amalgamated entities to enable them to decide whether to continue their deposits

controls.control_objective: To ensure be levied any penalty for such premature withdrawal
controls.control_description:
Depositors opting to
discontinue their deposits within the aforesaid period shall not be
levied any penalty for such premature withdrawal.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be levied any penalty for such premature withdrawal

controls.control_objective: To ensure be evaluated by nabard and rbi on merit and may be subject to such additional conditions or requirements that may be deemed necessary
controls.control_description:
(k) Proposals for amalgamation that meet the indicative
benchmarks shall be evaluated by NABARD and RBI on merit
and may be subject to such additional conditions or
requirements that may be deemed necessary.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be evaluated by nabard and rbi on merit and may be subject to such additional conditions or requirements that may be deemed necessary

controls.control_objective: To ensure be initiated by all concerned
controls.control_description:
(2) Upon grant of in-principle approval, the processes for amalgamation shall
be initiated by all concerned.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be initiated by all concerned

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit the following to rbi [through pravaah portal (https://pravaah
controls.control_description:
After completion of the above processes, the
State Government shall submit the following to RBI [through PRAVAAH
portal (https://pravaah.rbi.org.in)] and NABARD for final sanction / approval:
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit the following to rbi [through pravaah portal (https://pravaah

controls.control_objective: To ensure be transferred to the amalgamating entity on the date of amalgamation as advised by the rbi while giving final approval for the amalgamation
controls.control_description:
The assets and liabilities of the amalgamated entities shall be transferred to the
amalgamating entity on the date of amalgamation as advised by the RBI while
giving final approval for the amalgamation.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be transferred to the amalgamating entity on the date of amalgamation as advised by the rbi while giving final approval for the amalgamation

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue after the amalgamation process
controls.control_description:
The banking licence issued to the amalgamating entity shall continue after the
amalgamation process.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue after the amalgamation process

controls.control_objective: To ensure : (1) submit a compliance report with reference to the conditions of the final approval for amalgamation within the prescribed timeframe
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to : (1) submit a compliance report with reference to the conditions of the final approval for amalgamation within the prescribed timeframe

controls.control_objective: To ensure be converted into branches of the amalgamating entity and shall come under the purview of section 23 of the banking regulation act, 1949 (aacs)
controls.control_description:
(3) apply to RBI for branch licences for all existing branches of the
amalgamated entities within three months from the date of amalgamation
since all existing branches of the amalgamated entities shall be
converted into branches of the amalgamating entity and shall come
under the purview of Section 23 of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949
(AACS);
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be converted into branches of the amalgamating entity and shall come under the purview of section 23 of the banking regulation act, 1949 (aacs)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in accordance with the extant guidelines
controls.control_description:
(4) seek prior approval of RBI in case of shifting of branches and opening of
any new place of business including controlling offices, provided that the
granting of such approval shall be in accordance with the extant
guidelines;
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be in accordance with the extant guidelines

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The
directions, instructions, and guidelines repealed prior to the issuance of these
Directions shall continue to remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken,
or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall
continue to be governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or
acknowledgments granted under these repealed lists shall be deemed as
governed by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted,
continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may
be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been
repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation
of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time
being in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order
to remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of
these Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary
<image>
clarifications in respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any
provision of these Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding

controls.control_objective: To ensure be disclosed with details of the increase / reduction in liabilities as a result of change in pension scheme
controls.control_description:
The methodology of valuation / re-valuation
of the pension liabilities shall be disclosed with details of the increase / reduction
in liabilities as a result of change in pension scheme, if any.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be disclosed with details of the increase / reduction in liabilities as a result of change in pension scheme

controls.control_objective: To ensure capture details of changes
controls.control_description:
This disclosure shall
capture details of changes, if any, in pension schemes that will be made applicable
to the employees of amalgamating banks / amalgamated bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to capture details of changes

controls.control_objective: To ensure generally include: (1) scope / mandate of ddr
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to generally include: (1) scope / mandate of ddr

controls.control_objective: To ensure require
controls.control_description: Such other information and documents as the RBI may require.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to require
